importantInformation: Passengers, who has lost an article in GMRCL premises or in trains, can report at any station, or directly mail/call at Customer Care giving all details about the articles mentioning his/her address and contact numbers.
If the lost articles are not claimed within six months, deposited articles at the Lost & Found office will be disposed of.
Passenger Visiting at Lost and Found Office or station, to claim the lost & found items, shall bring a valid government ID having address on it.
If the lost articles are not claimed within six months, deposited articles at Lost & Found office will be disposed off.
